notes: Hakakian's book Assassins of the Turquoise Palace (2011) centers on the assassination of PDKI leader Sadegh Sharafkandi at the Mykonos restaurant in 1992.

evidence.description: Roya Hakakian, Assassins of the Turquoise Palace (2011) — book about the Mykonos assassination of Sadegh Sharafkandi.
